description: Committed retrieval-eval baseline for the CI regression gate (.github/workflows/knowledge-eval.yml). Holds ONLY aggregate metric numbers and golden-query ids — no workspace content, names, or counts. `overall` metrics are compared against a fresh eval run by packages/core/eval/regression.ts; the gate fails when any metric drops by more than `threshold` (relative) versus these numbers. Regenerate deliberately with `bun run eval:retrieval <workspaceId> --output packages/core/eval/retrieval-baseline.json` after an intentional pipeline change, then eyeball the delta before committing.
